new_american_oak.name: New American oak
new_american_oak.rule: When you **sell** bourbon that included this cask in the mash, **+$1** revenue once.

heavy_char.name: Heavy char
heavy_char.rule: Treat this cask as **+1** toward **award** thresholds that care about “quality” or char (if you use tiers).

second_use_barrel.name: Second-use barrel
second_use_barrel.rule: **−$1** to **entry rent** the first time you **barrel** the bourbon made with this cask (this placement only).

honey_barrel.name: Honey barrel
honey_barrel.rule: On **sell**, you may treat **market demand** as **+1** for **price lookup only** (once).

wine_finish_cask.name: Wine finish cask
wine_finish_cask.rule: When you **sell**, draw **+1** Bourbon Card (then choose as usual) **once** if your mash had **≥2** grains.

small_format.name: Small format
small_format.rule: When **aging** would add **1** year token, you may add **2** instead **once** (then flip this card sideways or discard—your call when balancing).

large_format.name: Large format
large_format.rule: **−$1** **rickhouse fee** for the rickhouse where this bourbon sits **once per turn** while this barrel is there (max **$1**).

independent_stave.name: Independent stave
independent_stave.rule: **Trade** only: this cask counts as **$2** toward trades where you value resources in **$** (if you use that optional rule).

cooper_s_select.name: Cooper’s select
cooper_s_select.rule: **Once** when you **make bourbon**, you may **look** at the top **Bourbon Card** after you commit the mash.

leaky_angel.name: Leaky angel
leaky_angel.rule: On **sell**, **+$1** revenue; **−$1** revenue if **market demand** is **0** (risk/reward).

yellow_dent_2.name: Yellow dent #2
yellow_dent_2.rule: No extra rule—this is the **baseline** specialty (vanilla flavor text only).

heirloom_blue.name: Heirloom blue
heirloom_blue.rule: **Silver**-related award checks treat **one** fewer matching symbol **once** when this corn is in the mash (if you use symbol checks).

bourbon_grade_bulk.name: Bourbon-grade bulk
bourbon_grade_bulk.rule: If this mash uses **3** corn cards, **+$2** on **sell**; if **1** corn, **+$0**.

high_starch_hybrid.name: High-starch hybrid
high_starch_hybrid.rule: On **make bourbon**, **gain $1** from the bank (once per mash that uses this card).

local_co_op_corn.name: Local co-op corn
local_co_op_corn.rule: On **sell**, if **≥2** other players have barrelled bourbon this game, **+$1** revenue.

waxy_corn.name: Waxy corn
waxy_corn.rule: When you **sell**, you may **discard 1** resource to **draw 1** Bourbon Card (then choose as usual).

two_row_malt.name: Two-row malt
two_row_malt.rule: **Once** on **sell**, treat your bourbon’s **age** as **+1** for **Market Price Guide** only.

six_row_spice.name: Six-row spice
six_row_spice.rule: If your mash also includes **rye**, **+$1** on **sell**.

peated_malt.name: Peated malt
peated_malt.rule: **Gold**-related checks: treat **one** requirement as satisfied if you also spent **+$0**—tune to your Gold card text (placeholder: **+1** “smoke” icon).

chocolate_malt.name: Chocolate malt
chocolate_malt.rule: On **sell**, if **market demand** is **even**, **+$1** revenue (ties to your **Notes** on even demand).

malted_rye.name: Malted rye
malted_rye.rule: **−$1** to **rickhouse fee** for **one** rickhouse where this barrel sits **this turn** (once).

canadian_style_rye.name: Canadian-style rye
canadian_style_rye.rule: On **trade**, you may swap this card for **any one** grain card from a willing player **without** using an extra action (still follow trade timing rules).

soft_red_winter.name: Soft red winter
soft_red_winter.rule: On **sell**, **+$1** revenue if your mash has **exactly 2** total grain cards (barley/rye/wheat).

wheated_bill_helper.name: Wheated bill helper
wheated_bill_helper.rule: If your mash has **no rye**, treat **demand** as **+1** for **price lookup** on **sell** (once).

creamy_wheat.name: Creamy wheat
creamy_wheat.rule: When you **sell**, you may **ignore** **−$1** revenue from **one** operations effect this turn (if applicable).

certified_organic_grain.name: Certified organic grain
certified_organic_grain.rule: On **sell**, **+$1**; **−$1** on **sell** if **market demand** is **odd** (if you track odd/even quirks).
certified_organic_grain.type_printed: *Choose* Corn or one Grain when drafted

heritage_grist.name: Heritage grist
heritage_grist.rule: Occupies **two** of your four **corn+grain** slots **by itself**; **+1** Bourbon Card draw on **sell** (then choose as usual).
heritage_grist.type_printed: Counts as **1 corn + 1 grain** in one card

neutral_spirits_transfer.name: Neutral spirits transfer
neutral_spirits_transfer.rule: **Bottled-in-Bond only** (if you want): may **combine** with another barrel in the same rickhouse for **one** merged **sell** (tune carefully).

charter_floor_myth.name: Charter floor myth
charter_floor_myth.rule: While this barrel is in a rickhouse, **ignore rickhouse fees** for **this barrel only** (still pay other barrels normally).

limestone_ledger_age.name: Limestone ledger age
limestone_ledger_age.rule: On **sell**, treat bourbon **age** as **+2** for **Market Price Guide** lookup only **once**.

headline_pour.name: Headline pour
headline_pour.rule: After this **sell** resolves, **market demand** increases by **+1** (clamp **0–12**) **once**.

tariff_whisper.name: Tariff whisper
tariff_whisper.rule: After this **sell** resolves, **market demand** decreases by **1** (clamp **0–12**) **once**.

wet_warehouse_floor.name: Wet warehouse floor
wet_warehouse_floor.rule: On **sell**, this bourbon’s proceeds are **−$2** after the Market Price Guide (minimum **$0** total from this sale before action fees).

green_grain_day.name: Green grain day
green_grain_day.rule: On **sell**, **−$1** revenue **once** (still playable — hedge with wheat specials).
